name: Pixcel Logo
description: Default landing-page artwork. Edit `blocks` (a string per row, '#' = on, '.' = off), then tweak `scale` to change stroke thickness in cells per block. `padding` is empty blocks around the design.

letters._note: Reference only. Source bitmaps for each glyph (5 tall). The `blocks` array below is the laid-out wordmark.

layout._note: Width: P(3) + gap(1) + i(1) + gap(1) + x(5) + gap(1) + c(3) + gap(1) + e(3) + gap(1) + l(3) = 23 blocks. Height: 5. Padding 2, scale 5 → 135×45 cells.
